import io
import list
import string

fn remove_first(_ nums: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = nums.len()
  while i < n
    match nums.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      if val == target and not found
        found = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, val)
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn dedup(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for n in nums
    if not list.contains(result, n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = nums
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(min_val)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, min_val)
    when None
      remaining = []
    end
  end
  sorted
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
for token in tokens
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(n)
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
  when None
    # skip non-integer tokens
  end
end

let unique = dedup(nums)
let sorted = sort_asc(unique)

mut output = ""
mut i = 0
let total = sorted.len()
while i < total
  match sorted.get(i)
  when Some(val)
    if i == 0
      output = "#{val}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{val}"
    end
  when None
    i = total
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(output)
